name: Han Juzi [Han Xun/Meng]
page_title: Han Juzi [Han Xun/Meng] 韓莒子[韓荀/猛] [Yuan Shao] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives

sections.short-biography: Cavalry officer at Wuchao, beheaded by Cao Cao.
sections.details:
Traditional Chinese 
	韓莒子[韓荀/猛]


	 Simplified Chinese 
	韓荀 (莒子)


	 Pronunciation 
	Han2ju3zi3 [han2xun2/meng3]


	 Pinyin (Tones) 
	Hánjǔzǐ [hánxún/měng]


	 Wade-Giles 
	Han Chü-tzŭ [han hsün/meng]

	 Other Names 
	Han Juzi (韓莒子) [SGZ 1], Han Xun (韓荀) [SGZ 9], Han Xun (韓𦳣) [SGZ 10], Han Meng (韓猛) [SGZ 10], Han Ruo (韓若) [SGZ 10]

	 Name Notes 
	Pei Songzhi notes that his names include Han Xun (韓𦳣) [U+26CE3], Han Meng (韓猛), and Han Ruo (韓若). And he appears as Han Juzi (韓莒子) in SGZ 1, along with some copies of the novel and other various sources.
sections.literary-appearances: Romance of the Three Kingdoms: 30Sanguozhi: Wei 1, Wei 9

full_text:
Han Juzi [Han Xun/Meng] 韓莒子[韓荀/猛]
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Han Juzi [Han Xun/Meng] (韓莒子[韓荀/猛]). Cavalry officer at Wuchao, beheaded by Cao Cao. Han Juzi [Han Xun/Meng] was affiliated with Yuan Shao. Han Juzi [Han Xun/Meng] lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
